title: Peppol invoice platform Belgium
excerpt: From January 2026 it will be mandatory in Belgium to use the Peppol platform for invoicing purposes. Peppol is the only option to comply with the new Belgian rules/requirements for the private sector. In this sense, we w…

posts.author: saralixa (Sara Lixa)
posts.cookedHtml: From January 2026 it will be mandatory in Belgium to use the Peppol platform for invoicing purposes. Peppol is the only option to comply with the new Belgian rules/requirements for the private sector. In this sense, we would be great if Monday will be integrated with Peppol in the near future.
